hero.subtitle: Tchalanet helps operators manage tickets, draws, points of sale, and public verification with clearer follow-up.
hero.title: Verify tickets and check the latest draws.

tchala.title: Dream Interpretation — Tchala
tchala.subtitle: Find the numbers associated with your dreams according to the Haitian Tchala.

footer.description: Digital infrastructure for professional management of tickets, draws, and lottery operations.

help.payment_answer: Tchalanet lets users consult ticket status. Payment, when applicable, follows the instructions from the participating point of sale.
help.subtitle: Answers about ticket verification, results, payments, and common issues.
help.title: Help

how.description: A simple path to consult ticket status and follow available results.

step1.text: Receive a ticket with QR or public code issued by a participating point of sale.
step1.title: Verifiable ticket

step2.text: Enter the public code or scan the QR to consult ticket status.
step2.title: Online verification

step3.text: Consult ticket status and confirmed results according to supported sources.
step3.title: Status and results

step4.text: If the ticket is payable, follow the displayed instructions to contact the point of sale.
step4.title: Payment instructions

how.title: How do I verify a ticket?

home.loadError: Unable to load the public page.

rules_link.description: Consult rules, simulation status, and Tchala references from one dedicated page.
rules_link.title: One page to understand the games

home.subtitle: Public route is available without login.
home.title: Tchalanet Web

operator.description: Discover how Tchalanet can simplify daily operations, improve sales tracking, and automate activity reports.
operator.title: Do you manage a point of sale or a seller network?

check.code_hint: The code format appears at the bottom of your printed receipt.
check.help_body: The public code is printed on the receipt issued by a participating point of sale. It can be entered manually or scanned from the QR when that option is available.
check.loading_body: Temporarily consulting the public verification service.

INVALID_OR_CANCELLED.body: This ticket cannot be verified as payable.
INVALID_OR_CANCELLED.title: Ticket invalid or cancelled

NOT_FOUND.body: Invalid or missing code. Check the code and try again.
NOT_FOUND.title: Ticket not found

NOT_PAYABLE.body: This ticket does not show a payable amount according to available results.
NOT_PAYABLE.title: Ticket not payable

PAYABLE.body: If the ticket is payable, follow the displayed instructions to contact the point of sale. Always keep the original receipt.
PAYABLE.title: Ticket payable

PENDING_RESULT.body: The ticket is recognized, but the draw result is not available yet.
PENDING_RESULT.title: Ticket awaiting result

SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE.body: Verification is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a few moments.
SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE.title: Service temporarily unavailable

check.security_body: This result is generated in real time by the Tchalanet verification system. No ticket data is retained after the consultation.

check-ticket.description: Enter your public code to consult your ticket status.
check-ticket.title: Verify a ticket

contact.body: Contact Tchalanet for a demo or operator orientation.
contact.description: A contact point for operators, points of sale, and public support requests.
contact.title: Contact Tchalanet

help.description: Find answers about ticket verification, results, payment, and common issues.
help.title: Help

privacy.body: This page will present privacy information for Tchalanet public surfaces.

results.description: Consult confirmed results according to supported sources.
results.title: Results

rules.description: Consult game rules and estimate an indicative payout from an example stake.

terms.body: This page will present the terms of use for Tchalanet public surfaces.
terms.description: Terms of use for Tchalanet public services.
terms.title: Terms of use

CONFIRMED.body: This result is available according to supported sources.
CONFIRMED.title: Confirmed results

PENDING.body: The result status is pending. Come back later to consult updated information.
PENDING.title: Pending

UNAVAILABLE.body: The result is temporarily unavailable for this draw.
UNAVAILABLE.title: Unavailable

results.empty: No result is available for now.

list.empty_body: No draw matches the selected filter.
list.title: Draw feed

results.subtitle: Confirmed results according to supported sources.

rules.disclaimer: Indicative simulation. The payable amount depends on the real ticket, point-of-sale rules, draw status, and confirmed results. This simulation does not guarantee payment.

borlette.body: Choose a two-digit number. Status depends on the available results for the relevant draw.
borlette.title: Borlette

lotto3.body: Select three digits. Verification depends on the ticket, draw, and supported sources.
lotto3.title: Lotto 3

lotto4.body: Select four or five digits depending on the game available at the participating point of sale.
lotto4.title: Lotto 4 & 5

mariage.body: Pair two numbers. Exact conditions must come from the catalog or displayed rules.
mariage.title: Mariage

rules.hero_caption: Public visual preview without result promise.
rules.hero_image_alt: Person consulting a Tchalanet mobile service
rules.simulation_backend_note: Calculation will be enabled when rules, limits, and catalogs are provided by the public service.
rules.simulation_unavailable: Simulation is temporarily unavailable for this game.
rules.subtitle: Consult game rules and estimate an indicative payout from an example stake.

dog.description: Cultural reference linked to vigilance, home, and close relationships.

money.description: Cultural reference associated with exchanges, accounts, and resources.

travel.description: Cultural reference linked to movement, change, and errands.

water.description: Cultural reference often linked to movement, passage, and renewal.
